critic_raw: Four issues: preprocessing leakage, internal split contradiction, metadata confound preventing image contribution isolation, and temporal leakage from seasonal patterns.
all_issues_raised: Preprocessing parameters fit on entire dataset before splitting — data leakage into test set
Stratified random split on 24-month data with temporal descriptions in Section 6 — internal contradiction between random split and months 17–20 validation window
Multimodal model includes metadata features (price tier, promotions, date) not in text-only baseline — cannot isolate image contribution
Temporal leakage from random split in e-commerce data with strong seasonal and promotional patterns

round_transcripts.critic: Four issues: preprocessing leakage, internal split contradiction, metadata confound preventing image contribution isolation, and temporal leakage from seasonal patterns.
round_transcripts.defender:
**On Issue 1 (Preprocessing leakage):** Confirmed by explicit design text.

**On Issue 2 (Split contradiction):** Section 2 describes random split without temporal constraints; Section 6 describes months 17–20 as the validation set. These are contradictory. If random, there is no month-bounded validation set. This is confirmed.

**On Issue 3 (Metadata confound):** The multimodal model adds image AND metadata while the baseline is text-only. Promotional flag and price tier are powerful predictors of customer satisfaction independent of review content. The design cannot isolate whether imaging or metadata drives performance improvement. This is a valid and material confound.

**On Issue 4 (Temporal leakage):** E-commerce data has clear seasonal structure. Random splitting allows cross-contamination of seasonal patterns. This is a real concern, though the practical magnitude depends on how strong seasonal effects are relative to review content.

round_transcripts.critic: All four issues confirmed. Issues 2 and 3 are the most material: the split description is self-contradictory, and the metadata confound means image contribution cannot be isolated even if all other issues were resolved.
round_transcripts.defender: All four issues stand. Issues 2 (split contradiction) and 3 (metadata confound) are the most material.

all_issues_adjudicated: Preprocessing parameters fit on entire dataset before splitting — data leakage
Internal contradiction: Section 2 describes random split but Section 6 references months 17–20 as validation set
Multimodal model includes metadata features not in baseline — cannot isolate image modality contribution
